theme: one compression dictionary for twelve unlike corpora
title: Twelve Corpora, One Dictionary
strategies: empty dictionary: ship no entries, every document stays fully literal (always feasible, ratio_doc == 1 everywhere)
global frequency greedy: rank all candidate substrings of the whole 12-document corpus by count*(length-1) and fill the budget top-down, ignoring which document each substring belongs to

worst-document water-filling: repeatedly find the currently worst-ratio document and spend the next budget unit on whichever substring gives it the best marginal ratio gain per budget character, bonus-weighted by how many other documents that substring also occurs in
domain-uniform quota: split the budget into 12 equal shares and greedily fill each document's private share independently, ignoring cross-domain reuse
